textByHash.08be493625725984b1adf6f8c157ca967e57a5cd: Ahh well they make it less likely that you'll accidently attack anyone wearing the same cape as you and easier to attack everyone else. They also make it easier to distinguish people who're wearing the same cape as you
textByHash.123cfbd0bc01ad253a4811850a9ca0691b590048: So would you like to buy one?
textByHash.189a04fadc167316e702a6f348d03ea9c3ac1497: Hello. How can I help you?
textByHash.2e7e3ec8c391952f7b596ea3a7e3d4f128640575: You don't have the power to enforce that. Go away!
textByHash.4c66973af106af665d4298b1d99016682511984b: They say there's trouble in Port Piscarilius. Something about gangs uniting. Might be worth looking into.
textByHash.57bc008e47142d0b069df08cbec0694455752ef1: That protest outside Kourend Castle is starting to attract some attention. Could be worth taking a look.
textByHash.5e7cef9b94d8fe65eaecfc1725126c5cbbac1291: Apparently there's been some commotion in the middle of Arceuus. Might be worth checking out.
textByHash.68ed39504975d77d006fd3f2d53d62ecb6487a41: My pub's called The Golden Field. It's where all the local workers come to relax and unwind after a hard day. I try to keep it really nice here for them. Anyway, are you drinking?
textByHash.7003ae9152b3045b9caf48757c6738847e16ee88: Lack of care? This is about Farmer Brumty and his sheep isn't it? That has nothing to do with us here! Why should we pay for his mistakes?
textByHash.765bcd607c66a461d6900d403ed4744d8f4fddd3: Phileas Rimor has supposedly been looking for some assistance with something in Shayzien. Maybe worth investigating.
textByHash.9673a99baba2d66b86861d53b87c7ea299106f6b: Apparently Veos is looking for some help with something. He hangs around the docks of Port Piscarilius.
textByHash.a40c1aca8cacc9931a665f874e1045d06509992d: from everyone else. They're very useful when out in the wilderness with friends or anyone else you don't want to harm.
textByHash.a90965fbfb22e6cb87a3f99c02ab263203de5709: No, it hasn't been very busy lately.
textByHash.a9d74092658630e7756901d5db0d76474bdcd292: Hello there, are you interested in buying one of my special capes?
textByHash.cb48bd4809a7679236fb21affffb65faaa19d370: I hear that the rulers of Lovakengj have some work available. You'll find them in the Lovakengj Assembly.
textByHash.d81d1da39a1ec327854d456f0683706dfee14535: I like a customer who knows when to stop.
textByHash.e5d39fe29713421435844c92f62a3359018d5773: I hear that Lord Hosidius has misplaced one of his sons. The Hosidius family might pay a lot to see him returned safely.
textByHash.ffcd4e85daaf1ef8a812c9e1945191647ad34228: You mourners may serve the king, but you don't have the power to enforce that. Go away!
